summary.description: Return top-line stats for one identity.
summary.sql: select count(*) as entry_count, max(logged_on) as last_logged_on, round(avg(energy), 1) as avg_energy, sum(case when flow = 'heavy' then 1 else 0 end) as heavy_days from cycle_logs where identity_id = :identityId

flow_breakdown.description: Return counts by flow level for one identity.
flow_breakdown.sql: select flow, count(*) as count from cycle_logs where identity_id = :identityId group by flow order by case flow when 'spotting' then 1 when 'light' then 2 when 'medium' then 3 when 'heavy' then 4 else 99 end

energy_trend.description: Return recent energy scores for the sparkline.
energy_trend.sql: select logged_on, energy from cycle_logs where identity_id = :identityId and energy is not null order by logged_on desc, id desc limit 12

recent_entries.description: Return recent entries with offset pagination.
recent_entries.sql: select id, logged_on, flow, coalesce(mood, '') as mood, energy, coalesce(symptoms_json, '[]') as symptoms_json, coalesce(notes, '') as notes from cycle_logs where identity_id = :identityId order by logged_on desc, id desc
